payload.text:
import { KeyCategory, KeyboardRow, KeyInfo } from './types';

export const KEY_DESCRIPTIONS: Record<string, { title: string; text: string }> = {
  'Esc': { title: 'Escape (Esc)', text: 'Annulla l\'azione corrente o esce da menu e modalità a schermo intero.' },
  'f1': { title: 'F1', text: 'Apre la "Guida" o l\'aiuto in linea del programma.' },
  'f2': { title: 'F2', text: 'Rinomina rapidamente un file o una cartella selezionata.' },
  'f3': { title: 'F3', text: 'Attiva la funzione di ricerca nel programma corrente.' },
  'f4': { title: 'F4', text: 'Chiude la finestra attiva (Alt+F4) o blocca riferimenti in Excel.' },
  'f5': { title: 'F5', text: 'Aggiorna (refresh) la pagina o la cartella corrente.' },
  'f6': { title: 'F6', text: 'Sposta il cursore nella barra degli indirizzi del browser.' },
  'f7': { title: 'F7', text: 'Controllo ortografico e grammaticale nei documenti.' },
  'f8': { title: 'F8', text: 'Accede al menu di avvio di Windows durante l\'accensione.' },
  'f9': { title: 'F9', text: 'Invia/Riceve email o aggiorna campi in Word.' },
  'f10': { title: 'F10', text: 'Attiva la barra dei menu.' },
  'f11': { title: 'F11', text: 'Attiva/Disattiva la modalità a schermo intero.' },
  'f12': { title: 'F12', text: 'Apre "Salva con nome" o gli strumenti sviluppatore.' },
  'PrtSc': { title: 'Stamp (Print Screen)', text: 'Cattura uno screenshot di tutto lo schermo.' },
  'Scroll': { title: 'Bloc Scorr (Scroll Lock)', text: 'Serve a far scorrere l\'intero foglio (es. Excel) usando le frecce.' },
  'Pause': { title: 'Pausa (Pause/Break)', text: 'Sospende l\'operazione in corso o mette in pausa alcuni processi.' },
  'Tab': { title: 'Tabulazione (Tab)', text: 'Sposta il cursore al prossimo campo o inserisce un rientro.' },
  'Caps Lock': { title: 'Bloc Maiusc', text: 'Attiva la scrittura permanente in maiuscolo.' },
  'Shift': { title: 'Maiusc (Shift)', text: 'Usa questo tasto insieme a un altro per scrivere maiuscole o i simboli in alto a sinistra del tasto.' },
  'Ctrl': { title: 'Control (Ctrl)', text: 'Tasto per scorciatoie. Tenendo premuto Ctrl e cliccando altri tasti si eseguono comandi rapidi.' },
  'Alt': { title: 'Alternativa (Alt)', text: 'Accede ai menu delle finestre o cambia finestra (Alt+Tab).' },
  'AltGr': { title: 'Alt Graph (AltGr)', text: 'Tenendolo premuto puoi scrivere i simboli in basso a destra del tasto, come @, #, [ o ].' },
  'Enter': { title: 'Invio (Enter)', text: 'Conferma comandi o inizia una nuova riga.' },
  'Backspace': { title: 'Backspace', text: 'Cancella il carattere a sinistra del cursore.' },
  'Delete': { title: 'Canc (Delete)', text: 'Cancella il carattere a destra o l\'elemento selezionato.' },
  'Space': { title: 'Barra Spaziatrice', text: 'Inserisce uno spazio tra le parole.' },
  'Win': { title: 'Tasto Windows', text: 'Apre il menu Start.' },
  'Fn': { title: 'Function (Fn)', text: 'Attiva funzioni speciali sui laptop.' },
  'Home': { title: 'Inizio (Home)', text: 'Sposta il cursore all\'inizio della riga corrente o in cima a un documento.' },
  'End': { title: 'Fine (End)', text: 'Sposta il cursore alla fine della riga corrente o in fondo a un documento.' },
  'PageUp': { title: 'Pagina Su (PgUp)', text: 'Scorre il contenuto verso l\'alto di una intera schermata.' },
  'PageDown': { title: 'Pagina Giù (PgDn)', text: 'Scorre il contenuto verso il basso di una intera schermata.' },
  'Insert': { title: 'Ins (Insert)', text: 'Passa tra modalità inserimento e sovrascrittura del testo.' },
  'ArrowUp': { title: 'Freccia Su', text: 'Sposta il cursore o la selezione verso l\'alto di una riga.' },
  'ArrowDown': { title: 'Freccia Giù', text: 'Sposta il cursore o la selezione verso il basso di una riga.' },
  'ArrowLeft': { title: 'Freccia Sinistra', text: 'Sposta il cursore o la selezione verso sinistra di un carattere.' },
  'ArrowRight': { title: 'Freccia Destra', text: 'Sposta il cursore o la selezione verso destra di un carattere.' }
};

const GAP = (width: string = 'w-10'): KeyInfo => ({ id: `gap-${Math.random()}`, label: '', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC, spacer: true, width });

const F_STRIPED = 'bg-striped-purple';
const COLOR_BACKSPACE = 'bg-rose-500 text-white border-rose-700';
const COLOR_ENTER = 'bg-teal-500 text-white border-teal-700';

export const KEYBOARD_LAYOUT: KeyboardRow[] = [
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Esc', label: 'Esc', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'f1', label: 'F1', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f2', label: 'F2', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f3', label: 'F3', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f4', label: 'F4', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f5', label: 'F5', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f6', label: 'F6', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f7', label: 'F7', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f8', label: 'F8', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f9', label: 'F9', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f10', label: 'F10', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f11', label: 'F11', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      { id: 'f12', label: 'F12', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'PrtSc', label: 'Stamp', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Scroll', label: 'BlocS', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Pause', label: 'Pausa', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'tilde', label: '\\', shiftLabel: '|', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '1', label: '1', shiftLabel: '!', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '2', label: '2', shiftLabel: '"', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '3', label: '3', shiftLabel: '£', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '4', label: '4', shiftLabel: '$', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '5', label: '5', shiftLabel: '%', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '6', label: '6', shiftLabel: '&', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '7', label: '7', shiftLabel: '/', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '8', label: '8', shiftLabel: '(', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '9', label: '9', shiftLabel: ')', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '0', label: '0', shiftLabel: '=', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'minus', label: '\'', shiftLabel: '?', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'equal', label: 'ì', shiftLabel: '^', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'Backspace', label: '⟵', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-24', customColor: COLOR_BACKSPACE },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'Insert', label: 'Ins', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Home', label: 'Inizio', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'PageUp', label: 'PgUp', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Tab', label: 'Tab ↹', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-20', customColor: 'bg-yellow-400 text-black border-yellow-600' },
      { id: 'q', label: 'Q', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'w', label: 'W', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'e', label: 'E', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'r', label: 'R', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 't', label: 'T', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'y', label: 'Y', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'u', label: 'U', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'i', label: 'I', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'o', label: 'O', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'p', label: 'P', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'bracketL', label: 'è', shiftLabel: 'é', altGrLabel: '[', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'bracketR', label: '+', shiftLabel: '*', altGrLabel: ']', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'Enter-Upper', label: '↵', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-14', customColor: COLOR_ENTER },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'Delete', label: 'Canc', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'End', label: 'Fine', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'PageDown', label: 'PgDn', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Caps Lock', label: 'Bloc Maiusc', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-24', customColor: 'bg-purple-600 text-white border-purple-800' },
      { id: 'a', label: 'A', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 's', label: 'S', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'd', label: 'D', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'f', label: 'F', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'g', label: 'G', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'h', label: 'H', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'j', label: 'J', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'k', label: 'K', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'l', label: 'L', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'semicolon', label: 'ò', shiftLabel: 'ç', altGrLabel: '@', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'quote', label: 'à', shiftLabel: '°', altGrLabel: '#', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'ù', label: 'ù', shiftLabel: '§', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'Enter', label: 'Invio', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-14', customColor: COLOR_ENTER },
      GAP('w-[48px]'),
      GAP('w-12'),
      { id: 'ArrowUp', label: '▲', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      GAP('w-12'),
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Shift', label: '⇧ Shift', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-28', customColor: 'bg-green-500 text-white border-green-700' },
      { id: 'less', label: '<', shiftLabel: '>', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'z', label: 'Z', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'x', label: 'X', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'c', label: 'C', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'v', label: 'V', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'b', label: 'B', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'n', label: 'N', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'm', label: 'M', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'comma', label: ',', shiftLabel: ';', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'period', label: '.', shiftLabel: ':', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'slash', label: '-', shiftLabel: '_', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'Shift-Right', label: '⇧ Shift', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-32', customColor: 'bg-green-500 text-white border-green-700' },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'ArrowLeft', label: '◀', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'ArrowDown', label: '▼', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'ArrowRight', label: '▶', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Ctrl', label: 'Ctrl', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16', customColor: 'bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-800' },
      { id: 'Win', label: 'Win', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16', customColor: 'bg-white text-black border-gray-400' },
      { id: 'Alt', label: 'Alt', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16', customColor: 'bg-red-600 text-white border-red-800' },
      { id: 'Space', label: '', category: KeyCategory.SPACE, width: 'w-80 flex-grow' },
      { id: 'AltGr', label: 'AltGr', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16', customColor: 'bg-orange-500 text-white border-orange-700' },
      { id: 'Fn', label: 'Fn', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16' },
      { id: 'Ctrl-Right', label: 'Ctrl', category: KeyCategory.MODIFIER, width: 'w-16', customColor: 'bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-800' },
      GAP('w-[158px]'),
    ]
  }
];

**Defining the React App**

I'm now focusing on defining the scope for this React application. I want to build an interactive Italian keyboard layout. My priority is user interaction – clickable keys that provide feedback. I'll need to define how the keyboard data (keys, layouts) is represented within the React components, considering the initial code.


**Refining the UI/UX**

I'm currently fleshing out the UI/UX, aiming for an interactive virtual keyboard. Key descriptions on hover/click are a must. Visual feedback is prioritized, ideally with both physical integration and virtual clicking. The design is intended to be responsive and modern using Tailwind CSS. Key data will be defined and structured for seamless React component integration, potentially using Gemini API for some "smart tips".


**Implementing Key Styling**

I'm now implementing key styling and interactivity. I've decided to create a custom Tailwind utility for the purple striped key variant. I also need to manage the currently selected key's state. I'm exploring Tailwind integration for responsiveness, considering `w-24` and related classes for key width.

entries.description: Primary entry point served in the browser
Keyboard layout and static data definitions

import React from 'react';
import { KeyCategory, KeyboardRow, KeyInfo } from './types';

export const KEY_DESCRIPTIONS: Record<string, { title: string; text: string }> = {
  'Esc': { title: 'Escape (Esc)', text: 'Annulla l\'azione corrente o esce da menu e modalità a schermo intero.' },
  'f1': { title: 'F1', text: 'Apre la "Guida" o l\'aiuto in linea del programma.' },
  'f2': { title: 'F2', text: 'Rinomina rapidamente un file o una cartella selezionata.' },
  'f3': { title: 'F3', text: 'Attiva la funzione di ricerca nel programma corrente.' },

  'f12': { title: 'F12', text: 'Apre "Salva con nome" o gli strumenti sviluppatore.' },

  'Tab': { title: 'Tabulazione (Tab)', text: 'Sposta il cursore al prossimo campo o inserisce un rientro.' },
  'Caps Lock': { title: 'Bloc Maiusc', text: 'Attiva la scrittura permanente in maiuscolo.' },
  'Shift': { title: 'Maiusc (Shift)', text: 'Usa questo tasto insieme a un altro per scrivere maiuscole o i simboli in alto a sinistra del tasto.' },
  'Shift-Right': { title: 'Maiusc (Shift)', text: 'Usa questo tasto insieme a un altro per scrivere maiuscole o i simboli in alto a sinistra del tasto.' },
  'Ctrl': { title: 'Control (Ctrl)', text: 'Tasto per scorciatoie. Tenendo premuto Ctrl e cliccando altri tasti si eseguono comandi rapidi.' },

  'AltGr': { title: 'Alt Graph (AltGr)', text: 'Tenendolo premuto puoi scrivere i simboli in basso a destra del tasto, come @, #, [ o ].' },
  'Enter': { title: 'Invio (Enter)', text: 'Conferma comandi o inizia una nuova riga.' },
  'Enter-Upper': { title: 'Invio (Enter)', text: 'Conferma comandi o inizia una nuova riga.' },
  'Backspace': { title: 'Backspace', text: 'Cancella il carattere a sinistra del cursore.' },
  'Delete': { title: 'Canc (Delete)', text: 'Cancella il carattere a destra o l\'elemento selezionato.' },
  'Space': { title: 'Barra Spaziatrice', text: 'Inserisce uno spazio tra le parole.' },

  'Fn': { title: 'Function (Fn)', text: 'Attiva funzioni speciali sui laptop.' },
  'Home': { title: 'Inizio (Home)', text: 'Sposta il cursore all\'inizio della riga corrente o in cima a un documento.' },

const GAP = (width: string = 'w-10'): KeyInfo => ({ id: `gap-${Math.random()}`, label: '', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC, spacer: true, width });

const F_STRIPED = 'bg-striped-purple';
const COLOR_BACKSPACE = 'bg-rose-500 text-white border-rose-700';
const COLOR_ENTER = 'bg-teal-500 text-white border-teal-700';

export const KEYBOARD_LAYOUT: KeyboardRow[] = [

      { id: 'f12', label: 'F12', category: KeyCategory.FUNCTION, customColor: F_STRIPED },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'PrtSc', label: 'Stamp', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Scroll', label: 'BlocS', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Pause', label: 'Pausa', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'tilde', label: '\\', shiftLabel: '|', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },

      { id: '6', label: '6', shiftLabel: '&', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },

      { id: '8', label: '8', shiftLabel: '(', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '9', label: '9', shiftLabel: ')', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: '0', label: '0', shiftLabel: '=', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'minus', label: '\'', shiftLabel: '?', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'equal', label: 'ì', shiftLabel: '^', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'Backspace', label: '⟵', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-24', customColor: COLOR_BACKSPACE },
      GAP(),
      { id: 'Insert', label: 'Ins', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'Home', label: 'Inizio', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
      { id: 'PageUp', label: 'PgUp', category: KeyCategory.NAVIGATION, width: 'w-12' },
    ]
  },
  {
    keys: [
      { id: 'Tab', label: 'Tab ↹', category: KeyCategory.ACTION, width: 'w-20', customColor: 'bg-yellow-400 text-black border-yellow-600' },
      { id: 'q', label: 'Q', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'w', label: 'W', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'e', label: 'E', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'r', label: 'R', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 't', label: 'T', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'y', label: 'Y', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'u', label: 'U', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },
      { id: 'i', label: 'I', category: KeyCategory.ALPHANUMERIC },

entries.description: Service for interacting with Gemini API to provide key tips
Component for showing details of the selected key

payload.text: Aggiungi degli effetti sonori; elimina i doppioni di Invio a destra,

**Addressing the Audio & Key**

I'm now focusing on adding sound effects to the Italian Keyboard Explorer app. Simultaneously, I'm working to remove the redundant "Invio" keys that appear, specifically targeting the split "Enter" key on the ISO layout. My immediate concern is ensuring that the sound implementation is intuitive and doesn't disrupt the user experience, while I also iron out the duplicate key issue.


**Refining the Key Layout**

I'm now diving into the code to handle the Enter key duplication. In `constants.tsx`, I've found the source: two entries, "Enter-Upper" and "Enter". I'll adjust the keyboard layout definition to represent the Italian ISO layout's single, larger Enter key. My focus now is ensuring the key's visual representation aligns with the correct functionality, simplifying the layout in the process.


**Simplifying the Enter Key**

I've examined the Enter key duplication, specifically the "Enter-Upper" and "Enter" entries. I've confirmed they represent the ISO Enter key. The layout is array-based, so I'll remove "Enter-Upper" and modify the primary "Enter" key for a cleaner, unified representation. I will simplify the layout as requested, to have only one "Enter" key on the Italian ISO layout, and I'll focus on making it visually correct.


**Consolidating the Key Layout**

I've been looking at the "Invio" keys, specifically the right "Enter" key, to understand the redundancy. I've realized it's not the Numpad Enter, but rather a vertically split "Enter" key on the Italian layout. I'll remove `Enter-Upper` and adjust the main "Enter" key, consolidating it into a single, unified key. I have a plan to create a sound service and integrate a basic "click" sound using the Web Audio API, which will be triggered on key clicks. I will ensure different frequencies for different key categories and will focus on the code.

entries.description: Service to play synthesized mechanical keyboard sound effects.
Remove duplicate Enter-Upper and adjust layout for a cleaner ISO-like representation in a flex grid.

  'f12': { title: 'F12', text: 'Apre "Salva con nome" o gli strumenti sviluppatore.' },
  'PrtSc': { title: 'Stamp (Print Screen)', text: 'Cattura uno screenshot di tutto lo schermo.' },
  'Scroll': { title: 'Bloc Scorr (Scroll Lock)', text: 'Serve a far scorrere l\'intero foglio (es. Excel) usando le frecce.' },
  'Pause': { title: 'Pausa (Pause/Break)', text: 'Sospende l\'operazione in corso o mette in pausa alcuni processi.' },

  'Alt': { title: 'Alternativa (Alt)', text: 'Accede ai menu delle finestre o cambia finestra (Alt+Tab).' },
  'AltGr': { title: 'Alt Graph (AltGr)', text: 'Tenendolo premuto puoi scrivere i simboli in basso a destra del tasto, come @, #, [ o ].' },
  'Enter': { title: 'Invio (Enter)', text: 'Conferma comandi o inizia una nuova riga.' },
  'Backspace': { title: 'Backspace', text: 'Cancella il carattere a sinistra del cursore.' },
  'Delete': { title: 'Canc (Delete)', text: 'Cancella il carattere a destra o l\'elemento selezionato.' },
  'Space': { title: 'Barra Spaziatrice', text: 'Inserisce uno spazio tra le parole.' },
  'Win': { title: 'Tasto Windows', text: 'Apre il menu Start.' },
  'Fn': { title: 'Function (Fn)', text: 'Attiva funzioni speciali sui laptop.' },
  'Home': { title: 'Inizio (Home)', text: 'Sposta il cursore all\'inizio della riga corrente o in cima a un documento.' },
  'End': { title: 'Fine (End)', text: 'Sposta il cursore alla fine della riga corrente o in fondo a un documento.' },
  'PageUp': { title: 'Pagina Su (PgUp)', text: 'Scorre il contenuto verso l\'alto di una intera schermata.' },
  'PageDown': { title: 'Pagina Giù (PgDn)', text: 'Scorre il contenuto verso il basso di una intera schermata.' },

entries.description: Integrate sound effects into key interaction logic.

payload.text: Implementa un feedback visivo quando un tasto viene premuto, come un leggero abbassamento e un'ombra più piccola, simile all'effetto `key-active`.

**Considering Visual Feedback**

I'm focusing on implementing visual feedback for key presses. The goal is a subtle key depression and shadow change, mirroring the effects of the `key-active` CSS class. I'm exploring the underlying code and design to integrate this feedback smoothly.


**Refining Interaction Visuals**

I've realized the `:active` pseudo-class within the existing `key-3d` class already provides the subtle visual feedback I was aiming for. It effectively simulates a key press on the virtual keyboard, so I may leverage that, and explore other effects to add, since I was not aware of its presence! The focus now is on testing this behavior and perhaps integrating a very brief "hit" state upon the event that a key is pressed.


**Addressing Physical Keyboard Presses**

I'm now considering how to manage visual feedback for physical keyboard presses, as opposed to clicks within the virtual keyboard. The existing `:active` state doesn't automatically trigger with physical input; therefore, I need to implement a mechanism to indicate a momentary "pressed" state, perhaps a short flash or temporary visual change. My goal is to make the virtual and physical keyboard's input look the same. I'm exploring different methods to integrate this functionality effectively.


**Clarifying Feedback States**

I'm now separating "selected" and "pressed" states. The `isActive` prop currently handles the "selected" (or focused) state in `Key.tsx`, which reflects details in the right side panel. I'll add an independent `isPressed` state to `App.tsx` to manage the momentary visual "down" animation for both physical and virtual key presses, implementing the desired "pressed" feedback.


**Managing Key Press States**

I'm now refining the approach to key press visuals. Instead of local state in `Key.tsx`, I'll track `pressedKeys` in `App.tsx` for physical keyboard sync. The `keydown` event will add a pressed key ID to this set, and `keyup` will remove it. I'll pass an `isPressed` prop to the `Key` component, and update the virtual keyboard click behavior to apply visual updates, using the `:active` CSS state.


**Separating Key States**

I'm now separating the "selected" and "pressed" visual states for the keys. I've realized the `key-active` class is perfect for "selected" (highlight) and will use that directly. I'll define `.key-pressed` in `index.html` to handle the physical "down" state (translateY), and I'll update `App.tsx` and `Key.tsx` to manage and apply these separate states accordingly. I want to keep the pressed visual brief and clear.


**Implementing Key Pop**

I'm now focusing on a "pop-up" effect for key presses. My plan involves CSS transitions or temporary states to simulate this. Specifically, I'm using `.key-active` in `Key.tsx` for visual highlights. I'll modify `index.html` to add the `.is-pressed` state for a low-profile look.


**Refining Physical Press Feedback**

I'm now revising the approach to physical key press feedback. I'm focusing on making the visual "down" state truly momentary. To achieve this, I'm refactoring the code. I'm using `key-pressed` in `index.html` for the transient visual down state and `key-selected` for the longer-term highlight. I'm modifying `App.tsx` to handle `pressedKeys` state, and updating `Key.tsx` to manage this properly.


**Synchronizing Press States**

I'm now integrating sound feedback and refining key press visual feedback in `App.tsx`. I'll introduce a `pressedKeys` set to track physical keyboard presses, ensuring consistency with mouse clicks. `Key.tsx` will receive an `isPressed` prop and apply the appropriate "lowered" class for transient visual cues and the "selected" class for the selected key. I'll define necessary CSS classes for visual downstates.


**Adjusting Press Visuals**

I'm now refining the CSS for key press visuals, specifically in `index.html`. I've added a transition to `.key-3d` to enhance the "pop" effect. I am considering the `box-shadow` and `transform` properties for a more pronounced "down" state for both `.key-pressed` and `.key-3d:active`. I'll also fix a "duplicate Enter" layout issue from earlier. Finally, the selected keys will get `z-index: 10`.

In questa versione ho separato la logica di **selezione** (tasto evidenziato in blu per mostrare i dettagli) dalla logica di **pressione** (feedback visivo del tasto che si abbassa). 

### Modifiche principali:
1.  **Stati Separati**: Introdotto lo stato `pressedKeys` per gestire quali tasti sono fisicamente o virtualmente "giù" in questo momento.
2.  **Feedback 3D**: Aggiornato il CSS in `index.html` e il componente `Key.tsx` per applicare l'effetto di abbassamento (`translateY`) e ombra ridotta solo quando il tasto è effettivamente premuto.
3.  **Sincronizzazione Tastiera**: Aggiunto un listener per l'evento `keyup` per far "risalire" i tasti della tastiera fisica.
4.  **Eventi Mouse**: Utilizzati `onMouseDown` e `onMouseUp/Leave` per simulare la pressione meccanica anche sui tasti virtuali.

entries.description: Aggiornamento CSS per distinguere gli stati 'pressed' (abbassato) e 'selected' (evidenziato).
Aggiornamento del componente Key per supportare lo stato isPressed e gestire eventi di pressione del mouse.
Implementazione della logica per gestire i tasti premuti (pressedKeys) e sincronizzare il feedback visivo 3D.

payload.text: Consentimi di scrivere sulla tastiera, consentimi di fare delle combinazioni di tasti CTR C cntr x cntrl z

**Developing Keyboard Writing**

I'm focusing now on enabling actual writing within the keyboard explorer. The existing output simulation is proving insufficient. I need a way for users to input complete words and phrases, not just see key presses. This demands more than just a visual display; real-time interaction is essential. I'm exploring how to translate key sequences into text strings.


**Implementing Shortcut Keys**

I'm now integrating keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+C, Ctrl+X, and Ctrl+Z. I've updated `handleKeyAction` to capture modifier states and am working on displaying command triggers in the output. The 'Typed Output Simulation' will now show visual feedback, such as "[Copiato!]" for Ctrl+C. I'm aiming for a more editor-like UI to acknowledge multi-key commands and considering adding distinct sounds.

Per rendere l'applicazione più interattiva e supportare le scorciatoie da tastiera, implementerò un sistema di rilevamento delle combinazioni di tasti. Quando premerai combinazioni come `Ctrl+C`, `Ctrl+X` o `Ctrl+Z`, l'area di testo mostrerà un feedback visivo specifico per l'azione eseguita (ad esempio "[COPIATO]").

Inoltre, ho migliorato l'area di scrittura per permettere una digitazione più fluida e naturale, mantenendo la sincronia con i tasti virtuali.

### Specifiche dell'aggiornamento:
1.  **Rilevamento Scorciatoie**: L'app ora intercetta `Ctrl + C`, `Ctrl + X`, `Ctrl + Z` e `Ctrl + V`.
2.  **Feedback Visivo Combinazioni**: Quando una scorciatoia viene attivata, l'area di "Typed Output" mostrerà temporaneamente un'etichetta dell'azione (es. `[Tagliato]`).
3.  **Simulazione Scrittura Avanzata**: Gestione migliorata dei tasti speciali (Invio per nuova riga, Spazio, Backspace) per far sembrare l'area di output un piccolo editor di testo.
4.  **Audio Dinamico**: Le scorciatoie avranno un feedback sonoro dedicato leggermente diverso per distinguerle dalla digitazione standard.

entries.description: Implementazione della logica di scrittura avanzata e rilevamento delle scorciatoie Ctrl+C, X, Z, V.

payload.text: Trasformalo in un gioco a premi, s'' creativo

**Conceptualizing Gamification**

I'm currently fleshing out the concept of transforming the Italian Keyboard Explorer into a game. The core focus is on gamifying keyboard exploration, encompassing layout familiarity, key descriptions, and interactions. I'm exploring the integration of AI-powered tips via Gemini, aiming for a dynamic learning experience. The plan also includes immersive sound effects, specifically synthesized mechanical sounds, and 3D visual key feedback to enhance engagement.


**Designing Game Mechanics**

I've been developing the core mechanics for "The Ultimate Key Master." Missions and quests will drive engagement, with points awarded for speed and accuracy. Levels progress from Amateur to Master, unlocking rewards like virtual trophies and "special keys." The UI will feature a flashy, neon design reminiscent of a technical "Wheel of Fortune." Gemini will act as the "Host," guiding the challenges. I'm focusing on state management, currently working on `App.tsx` and the `components/GameHUD`.

Per trasformare l'app in un vero **gioco a premi interattivo**, implementerò una meccanica di "Missioni" e "Livelli". Diventerai il protagonista di **"Il Maestro della Tastiera"**, un quiz show dove la tua velocità e conoscenza del layout italiano vengono messe alla prova.

### Specifiche del "Game Show":
1.  **Sistema di Punteggio e Combo**: Ogni tasto corretto o scorciatoia indovinata aumenta il punteggio. Colpire tasti in rapida successione attiva un moltiplicatore "Combo".
2.  **Missioni Dinamiche**: Un display a scorrimento (HUD) ti chiederà di trovare tasti specifici (es. "Trova il tasto per la chiocciola @") o eseguire scorciatoie (es. "Annulla l'ultima azione").
3.  **Livelli di Carriera**: Inizierai come "Digitòfilo Novizio" per scalare fino a "Gran Maestro del Silicio".
4.  **Effetti Visivi "Show"**: Neon pulsanti, particelle quando completi una missione e un feedback sonoro celebrativo.
5.  **Bonus Gemini AI**: Chiedere suggerimenti a Gemini non solo ti istruisce, ma sblocca "Punti Conoscenza" extra.

entries.description: Trasformazione dell'interfaccia in un gioco a premi con sistema di missioni, punteggio e livelli.
Aggiornamento dello stile dei dettagli del tasto per integrarsi nel tema gioco.
Aggiunta di font e rifiniture estetiche per il tema "Maestro della Tastiera".
